dialogue.name: Bondman's Comrade
dialogue.speech: Impossible... All of our pursuers are...

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: Let's go back to our hideout and regroup.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I have a bad feeling about this.

dialogue.name: Bondman's Comrade
dialogue.speech: No way... Bondman, this can't be happening!

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: I can't believe this! Hey, hey! Wake up!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, Anya.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya is busy right now.

dialogue.name: Bondman
dialogue.speech: This is just awful.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: No! I don't wanna study!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, hold on.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We made a deal. You agreed to start studying at PM.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: You demon! Papa is a demon!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Operation Strix, Phase ...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In order to attend the target's social gathering,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to make sure my daughter Anya becomes an Imperial Scholar.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: For her to achieve that, she will need to get good grades

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and receive Stellas.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: How many times do I have to tell you?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's supposed to be an "E," not an "A."

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: B-But, Loid-san, her math score here is pretty good.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Well done, Anya-san.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He has two-eighths of his b*ll*ts left!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is this because of her cartoon?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, that's right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This proverb is the same one Bondman was saying in episode .

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I forgot...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, remember!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You know, it's the episode where the guy with the sideburns appeared.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I just happened to mess up my mind-reading cheat on this test.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: From now on, I'm gonna spend a lot of time

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: Good at: ??

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: trying to figure out which classmate is good at what subject.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: And then I will definitely get perfect scores,

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: no problem.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I tried sounding like Papa.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It would be easy to make her every score an A+ by using backdoor methods.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But if she suddenly scores that high,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: the school and those around her will become suspicious.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In order to make this all seem as natural as possible,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to nurture her basic knowledge.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If she ends up being shunned by her classmates, it may affect her life at school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can't have her not wanting to go to school.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: If I read everyone's minds to get s, they'll all hate me?

dialogue.name: Adult A
dialogue.speech: Hey, how do you even know that?

dialogue.name: Adult B
dialogue.speech: You creepy little witch!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess forcing her to study too much might be a bit rough on her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If her motivation remains low, her concentration won't improve,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so she'll have a lesser chance of learning.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A change of pace is also important.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There are ways of earning Stella besides academics.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Right, then.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why don't we take a break from studying and draw?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: For example, art.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, that looks really cool!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is it a cheetah? No, wait...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I bet it's a panda!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: It's a moo cow. The one that was at school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: For example, music!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is a violin for children.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's always sports!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on, don't cry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Stay calm, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She's still in first grade.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to figure out what she has a talent for and help her excel in it.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Why don't we do some jump rope?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's a lot of fun.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Right. Don't panic.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's not like Desmond is immediately going to make his move.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It takes an incredible amount of time to begin a w*r.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But...

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: HQ was estimating that she'd be able to receive eight Stella in about four months.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Do we actually have that much time?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya will do her best.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Now untie me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Uh, right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why don't we go out tomorrow?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: An ooting?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Academics, the arts, sports...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But there is actually one other way to earn Stella.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Community service.

dialogue.name: Head Nurse
dialogue.speech: Thank you so much for agreeing to volunteer at our hospital today.

dialogue.name: Head Nurse
dialogue.speech: I will now go over the duties we'll be asking you to perform.

dialogue.name: Head nurse
dialogue.speech: We will have you split up into your families to perform your duties.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In the past, there have been many cases where students

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: did long-term volunteer work to earn their Stella.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Rescuing others or helping apprehend criminals

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: were also methods a few used to earn Stella, but rare.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We could use more personnel from HQ to act out these scenarios,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but considering the risks that could entail, we won't be able to easily pull that off.

dialogue.name: Head nurse
dialogue.speech: That is what we will be expecting from all of you.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Even if she isn't immediately able to receive any Stella,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: it would be beneficial to Anya to learn the importance of community service.

dialogue.name: Head nurse
dialogue.speech: Now, if I can have the Forgers clean this dressing room.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: There's a pool!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes, for physical therapy.

dialogue.name: Head nurse
dialogue.speech: Maybe cleaning was a bit difficult for you.

dialogue.name: Head nurse
dialogue.speech: Then let's have you organize books in the library.

dialogue.name: Nurse A
dialogue.speech: Excuse me, sir, could you do something about... that?

dialogue.name: Nurse A
dialogue.speech: Could you go work somewhere else?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya is bored with chores.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I wanna do the job where I give the doctors their scalpels.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'mma go to the operating room!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey! Stop that! Come back here!

dialogue.name: Head nurse
dialogue.speech: We've had enough of your "help"! Please leave!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, I'm sorry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Don't worry about it. Everyone fails sometimes.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But what do we do if our chances of earning Stella through community service also dry up?

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: Hey, is physical therapy hard?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: It is,

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: but you need to work hard so that you can run again.

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: Man...

dialogue.name: Male swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Three more minutes.

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: Hey, is the water in the pool cold?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Don't worry about that. Go on, get changed.

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: I'll go get changed, too.

dialogue.name: Male swim instructor
dialogue.speech: All right, one, two. One, two. One, two.

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: I wonder if that's the adult pool...

dialogue.name: Male swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Focus on your toes.

dialogue.name: Male swim instructor
dialogue.speech: One, two. One, two. One, two. One, two.

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: Man... it really is kinda cold.

dialogue.name: Male swim instructor
dialogue.speech: You're almost there! One, two. One, two.

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Ken?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Is he still changing?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hmm... I might have to ask HQ to reconsider our game plan.

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: C-Can't... breathe...

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: My legs... won't move...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The pool!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What is it? You just went to the bathroom, didn't you?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Someone's drowning in the pool!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What?! How do you know that?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Exactly who are you?!

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: Help me... Help me...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya is terrible at volunteering.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: So I...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna become a pro swimmer and get stars,

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: so I'm gonna go practice in the pool!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What?! Come back here! That's not a public pool!

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Ken!

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: He must've snuck out.

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Hey!

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Where are your parents?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Wow! The pool! How fun!

dialogue.name: Patient A
dialogue.speech: What's that about?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Where is the drowning person?

dialogue.name: Ken
dialogue.speech: I'm... gonna die...

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: What are you doing, little girl?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya... can't... anymore...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, are you two all right?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Ken!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa...

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Someone get a doctor!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I tried to swim and found this boy sinking.

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Ken!

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Ken!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Calm down, miss.

dialogue.name: Male swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Is everything okay?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Ken! Ken!

dialogue.name: Patient A
dialogue.speech: But there were so many people around.

dialogue.name: Patient B
dialogue.speech: Did you hear anything?

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry! I had no idea you were drowning!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It was a drowning response.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Children tend to drown more quietly than you would expect.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Many die because no one notices they're drowning.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Please make sure you keep your eye on him.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And good job for noticing.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I saw bubbles.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And you should be careful, too.

dialogue.name: Female swim instructor
dialogue.speech: Thank you! Thank you!

dialogue.name: Patient B
dialogue.speech: Well done, little girl!

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: First-year student from the Cecile Dorm, Anya Forger,

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: has earned a Stella for rescuing a boy.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You're amazing, Anya!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You're the first of the first graders to get one!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I'm so proud of you for some reason.

dialogue.name: Henry
dialogue.speech: Ultra-amazingly elegant, Miss Forger.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Well done, Anya!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: She beat me.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You're amazing, Miss Anya! Truly amazing!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm so happy for you!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She unexpectedly earned a Stella.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: An excellent result,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but how do I describe this?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's similar to how I feel when I've thwarted a t*rror1st attack.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm so proud of her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well done.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya's powers actually helped someone?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Eheh!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All right, then. I'm going to make you a feast today.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya wants Papa to cook.

dialogue.name: Stella needed to become an Imperial Scholar
dialogue.speech: Tonitrus Bolts until expulsion: Everyone's respect: +

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Shock!

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: I heard that your daughter earned a Stella, Agent Twilight.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes, Handler. She somehow managed it.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Couldn't we set things up with other agents

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: to fake whatever you need to get the other Stella?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: People would get suspicious.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: More importantly, we can't take risks that could potentially

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: expose the identities of other agents or get them arrested.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Yes, you've got a point.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is HQ panicking a bit?

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: No.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: But there are numerous businesses surrounding Desmond

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: that seem to be engaging in shady financial dealings lately.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: We can't be too laid back in this situation.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Try to make contact with Desmond immediately.

dialogue.name: Handler
dialogue.speech: Give your daughter some candy or something to get her motivated.

dialogue.name: Girl student A
dialogue.speech: Morning!

dialogue.name: Girl student B
dialogue.speech: Did you see that thing yesterday?

dialogue.name: Boy student A
dialogue.speech: I forgot my homework!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Heh.

dialogue.name: Boy student A
dialogue.speech: Hey, is that her? The girl from Class that suddenly got a Stella?

dialogue.name: Boy student B
dialogue.speech: Apparently it's a new record.

dialogue.name: Girl student A
dialogue.speech: I heard she rescued someone.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: This star is just so brilliant that I stand out now.

dialogue.name: Boy student A
dialogue.speech: Really?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Heh.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Good morning, Anya!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Tsk, tsk, tsk.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Call me "Starlight Anya."

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Uh... Sure.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You're totally like a celebrity now.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Everyone looks up to you.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You might even make a hundred friends!

dialogue.name: Anya as Damian
dialogue.speech: Bam!

dialogue.name: Anya as Damian
dialogue.speech: I totally see you in a new light, Miss Anya! Be my friend!

dialogue.name: Anya as Damian
dialogue.speech: You should totally come over to my place with your dad!

dialogue.name: Anya as Loid
dialogue.speech: Bam!

dialogue.name: Anya as Loid
dialogue.speech: Well done, Anya! The mission is now a success!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: And so the world was at peace.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Don't get a big head.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What's their problem? Ugh! They make me so mad!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: That didn't go as planned. The world is in peril.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Let's go, Anya.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Let's go, Starlight Anya.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yup.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Ugh, what a pain.

dialogue.name: Boy student C
dialogue.speech: Ha. That's hilarious.

dialogue.name: Boy student D
dialogue.speech: Who does she think she is?

dialogue.name: Boy student D
dialogue.speech: She keeps showing off her stupid badge.

dialogue.name: Boy student C
dialogue.speech: Who actually comes to school wearing it?

dialogue.name: Girl student C
dialogue.speech: Who would believe such a violent girl actually rescued someone?

dialogue.name: Girl student D
dialogue.speech: They say she saved a kid from drowning,

dialogue.name: Girl student D
dialogue.speech: but she probably kicked him in and let him sink herself.

dialogue.name: Girl student C
dialogue.speech: Oh, I could totally see that!

dialogue.name: Girl student D
dialogue.speech: What if she actually paid the school a bunch of money for her Stella?

dialogue.name: Girl student E
dialogue.speech: What? She doesn't look that rich to me.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Shock...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Don't even worry about it. They're all just jealous.

dialogue.name: Girl student F
dialogue.speech: Hey, Damian. Wouldn't you agree?

dialogue.name: Girl student G
dialogue.speech: She totally cheated, didn't she?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Do you really think we go to some third-rate school

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: that would hand out Stella by mistake?Or because someone was being underhanded?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Is that what you think?

dialogue.name: Girl student F
dialogue.speech: Uh, no...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: If you've got a problem with our school,

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: why don't you take the transfer exam for another one?

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: He's so manly at times like this.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Gosh, he's cool.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: The fact that she didn't cheat is why I'm so mad that this little shrimp got ahead of me.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Maybe he's more earnest than he looks.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: Let's begin class.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: By the way,

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: have you decided what your reward's going to be,

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: An—Starlight Anya?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Reward?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Of course! Whenever you work really hard on tests or contests,

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: you're supposed to get a reward.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: You mean I can get peanuts?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Come on, you should ask for something way more expensive.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: After the test we had the other day,

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I got them to buy me a cute little dress and a tiara!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: But I mean...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I guess they haven't given me that much.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Is your family part of a secret organization that pulls the world's strings?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What are you talking about? They run a perfectly legitimate company.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Then Anya wants a castle.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: That might be asking for too much.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Where would you even put it?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Then...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A year's worth of peanuts?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: That shouldn't be a problem at all, but is that really what you want?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Rewards are difficult.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Well... I think the reward that made me the happiest is my little Wiesel.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Oh, that's my puppy! It's the cutest!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Come here, Weezy!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mister Dog?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Do you have a dog, too, Second Son?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Huh? A dog?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What are you asking that jerk for?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Max!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Who cares?

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Don't talk to me!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya has a doggy now, too.

dialogue.name: Anya as Damian
dialogue.speech: All right! Let's see who's cuter, yours or my Max!

dialogue.name: Anya as Damian
dialogue.speech: Bring it over to my place! And your dad, too!

dialogue.name: Anya as Donovan
dialogue.speech: Well, hello, Mr. Forger.

dialogue.name: Anya as Loid
dialogue.speech: Let's stop this w*r, Mr. Desmond.

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: And so the world was at peace.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Heh.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You want a dog... as a reward?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mm-hm.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Having a dog will bring peace.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Peace? Like peace of mind?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hmm... Well, I was thinking of buying you something.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Miss Anya...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Taking care of a living creature requires a lot of work.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It is a very big responsibility!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Responsibility...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A dog, huh? Yeah...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let's discuss this a bit further.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: A properly trained dog may prove useful in securing this house.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Dogs are so violent, though.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm so terribly worried that one might rip Miss Anya to shreds.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya would like a cute puppy, please, Papa.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A tiny one.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh? Sure, all right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ah, well. I'm sure we can find a small dog that's still capable.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll see if HQ can get us one later.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: All right. Why don't we go to a pet shop this weekend?

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: We get a buyer yet?

dialogue.name: Smuggler B
dialogue.speech: Things are pretty tough right now.

dialogue.name: Smuggler B
dialogue.speech: We got some punks who think they're revolutionaries.

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: What, they gonna use 'em as b*mb dogs?

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: These little guys sure have it rough,

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: getting tinkered with just so they can end up as toys for some humans.

dialogue.name: Smuggler B
dialogue.speech: Shut up! If you want food, quit yer yappin'!

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: They sure don't look that smart.

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: Do Numbers Three and Five look weaker to you?

dialogue.name: Smuggler B
dialogue.speech: Hell if I know. Who cares?

dialogue.name: Smuggler A
dialogue.speech: God, it always reeks in here.

dialogue.name: Smuggler B
dialogue.speech: Yeah, let's get the hell outta here.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya wants this one...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Or this one!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, thank goodness. They look very weak.
